response.justification: The candidate demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside backend technologies like Kotlin/Java and databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL). Their work includes high-scale systems (millions of requests/sec), AI-agent infrastructure, and contributions to open-source projects. However, recent AI-agent work may slightly dilute primary stack exposure, and some roles lack depth in cloud platforms like AWS/GCP.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Strong architectural skills with contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects
concerns: Recent role (re:cinq) focuses heavily on AI-agent infrastructure, which may reduce primary stack exposure
Limited explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes in recent roles
Diverse stack experience may dilute depth in core technologies like Nest.js or Vitest

key_factors.factor: Recent AI-agent focus vs. core stack depth
